blockers: Leaf worker tool runs did not expose background agent_ids, so launch_started telemetry could not include agent_id fields.
top_findings: No unified stop mechanism from monitor; stop is via stampede.sh --teardown or manual tmux operations (monitor ignores pidfiles).
Teardown is opt-in (no general traps) and relies on pidfiles; risks include stale PID reuse, incomplete cleanup if tmux session is ended directly, and no SIGKILL escalation.
Tests/CI do not validate teardown semantics; smoke test does not assert tmux/pids/.stampede cleanup.
